name: Broken Violin
descs:
[Effects apply only to #5 and #6 Deployed Identities]

At 45%- HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Clash Win (2 times per turn for each character)

At 20%- HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Skill Use instead (2 times per turn for each character)

[Effects apply only to #5 and #6 Deployed Identities]

At <style="upgradeHighlight">65%-</style> HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Clash Win (2 times per turn for each character)

At <style="upgradeHighlight">40%-</style> HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Skill Use instead (2 times per turn for each character)

<style="upgradeHighlight">When winning a Clash after 5+ Clashes, the Skill that won the Clash deals +(# of Clashes x 2)% damage (max 20%)</style>

[Effects apply only to #5 and #6 Deployed Identities]

At 65%- HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Clash Win (2 times per turn for each character)

At 40%- HP, gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [TakeHpHealIncrease] on Skill Use instead (2 times per turn for each character)

When winning a Clash after 5+ Clashes, the Skill that won the Clash deals <style="upgradeHighlight">+(# of Clashes x 3)% damage (max 30%)</style>
